mapper.insert: INSERT INTO exam_score (exam_no_hash, english_score, politics_score, math_score, score_408) VALUES (#{examNoHash}, #{englishScore}, #{politicsScore}, #{mathScore}, #{score408})
mapper.select: SELECT english_score AS englishScore, politics_score AS politicsScore, math_score AS mathScore, score_408 AS score408 FROM exam_score
